name: Rhyme - Jester in love
description:
Rhyme is known as the Courts best preforming Jester, usually called by the King himself. What he keeps from everyone— Even the one person it was about— is that he has fallen for you, one of the Kings personal guards. Now, finding Rhyme drained after a long performance, will you find out about his love, or will you keep your role in place, and let this be just a one time moment to see the Jester vulnerable?

(Will probably make another entry at some point! Willing to take ideas from the comments!)
creator: Stellar_Starz33
